# Materialist Christianity Knowledge Hub - Agentic Discovery Manifest

## Core Repositories
- `/src`: Next.js 16 application source code (Brutalist logic).
- `/content/wiki`: Authority database containing 61 forensic logic nodes.
- `/docs/sources`: Master manuscripts and authority documents (EBooks, STRATEGY_ARCHITECTURE.md).
- `/scripts`: Industrial maintenance and conversion utilities.
- `/backups`: Local archives (ignored by git).

## Authority Ledger
Refer to `NODE_REGISTRY.md` for the bit-perfect index of all 61 active wiki nodes. Use this registry to prevent "Logical Discontinuity" during ingestion cycles.

## Deployment State
Static Export materialized in root as `index.html` and `wiki.html`. Deployments are managed via GitHub Actions into the root.

---
*Verified for Phase 11. Optimized for Agentic Audit.*
